company.name: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd.
company.subtitle: Indian generics + biosimilars. FY25 (Mar25) revenue INR 325B / ~$3.85B (+17% YoY). NA 44% (~$1.7B; gRevlimid ~$750M peak), India 17%, EM 16%, Europe 7% (post-Haleon NRT acquisition Sep 2024), PSAI 10%. Net cash ~$680M. gRevlimid volume cap step-up Q1FY26, full LOE Jan 2026. Semaglutide India patent expiry Mar 2026 = major opportunity.

assets.name: gRevlimid (lenalidomide complex generic - DRL allocation)
assets.stage: Commercial (peak FY25 ~$750M; full LOE Jan 2026 means competition step-up)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: DRL gRevlimid ~22% US lenalidomide volume share at peak

assets.name: Toripalimab (anti-PD-1 mAb) - India license from Junshi (Loqtorzi)
Dr Reddy's North America generics franchise (ex-gRevlimid)
Dr Reddy's India branded + generics franchise
Dr Reddy's Europe + Haleon NRT franchise
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$490M EU; Haleon NRT consumer ex-US closed Sep24)

assets.name: DRL rituximab biosimilar (US BLA path; bDA-21)
DRL semaglutide generic (India 2026 LOE; obesity + T2D)
assets.stage: Phase 3 / India launch March 2026 patent expiry

company_slice_sources.row.reachPct: DRL India semaglutide post-LOE ~5-10% India GLP-1 volume

catalysts.title: Semaglutide India patent expiry; DRL launch
gRevlimid full LOE; volume cap removed
